title: Trump: 'I don't think about Americans' financial situation' — 'not even a little bit' in Iran talks
snippet: On May 12, Trump told reporters as he left for China: 'I don't think about Americans' financial situation. I don't think about anybody.' When asked if Americans' finances motivated him to make a deal with Iran, he said 'Not even a little bit.' CPI had just hit 3.8% — 3-year high driven by Iran war energy costs.
tag_reason: New controversial statement by Trump on 5/12, not previously reported
